value.rationale: The fetched page is entirely about "Antigravity 2.0" subagents — covering asynchronous subagent invocation, lifecycle states, inter-agent communication, built-in vs. custom subagents, delegation hierarchy, permissions, and multi-agent teamwork. There is no mention anywhere on the page of "context compaction," "manual + auto" context compression, or any feature that compresses conversation/context to extend effective working memory. The claim is not substantiated by this page.
